item.description:
Fixes:
- Fixed a recording failure path where Recappi could continue into upload even when recording.m4a was missing or empty.
- If no system or microphone audio is captured, Recappi now stops with a clear recording error instead of creating a broken cloud upload.
- Added visible technical details to missing-audio errors so a screenshot can show the session folder and audio file states.
- Added capture-health diagnostics for recording failures, including system/mic buffer counts and generated audio file sizes in audio-capture.json.
- Removed the extra menu chevron from the recording error recovery menu.
